stage_identity.evidence: Teen blob form visible with gangly limbs, blue color, proper teen proportions maintained. Canonical teen stage anchor features preserved: desk, oversized laptop, Chicago skyline window.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean pixel art aesthetic with dithered shading, readable silhouette, 2D forms maintained.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Byte shown sleeping in cozy bed with closed eyes, three light blue Z's floating above head in scattered formation, night scene with laptop glow illuminating scene, Chicago city lights visible through window.

artifact_free.evidence: No text leakage, no malformed anatomy, no duplicated parts, no smeared objects. Scene is clean.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Trophy shelf with one golden trophy on left and one green plant on right, clear spacing between them. Food bowl visible on floor with single instance. Desk and laptop properly positioned. No prop overlap or clipping.

anchors_present.evidence: Desk with wooden surface visible, oversized laptop with screen glow, Chicago skyline window showing city lights, trophy shelf above with trophy and plant.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Night-time lighting with deep purple-blue tones, laptop providing soft amber glow, city lights twinkling through window. Sleeping state confirmed with Z's and closed eyes. Peaceful restful mood.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Not applicable for normal mode - reground_cleanup check is only for reground mode.

prompt_summary: Sleeping teen Byte at night with Z's floating, cozy bed, laptop glow, Chicago skyline window, trophy shelf with trophy and plant
